meta.label: Enter through the disguised medical/service route
meta.design_note: Soft entry gate: the crew enters cleanly if they commit to the disguised service route.

meta.label: Loop club security feed
meta.design_note: Supports crew-split play: one player can create safety while others move toward cash.

meta.label: Steal the security keycard
meta.design_note: Concrete key before the cash cage, making the gate readable.

meta.label: Open the cash counting room cage
meta.design_note: Hard cash reward is behind a clear keycard gate.

meta.label: Bag the gate receipts
meta.design_note: Primary reward after passing the cash-counting gate.

meta.label: Pull the field service key from the power cabinet
meta.design_note: Encourages route split: one player can open the escape path while others bag cash.

meta.label: Unlock the field service spine
meta.design_note: Turns the map from interior heist to exposed bowl-crossing escape.

meta.label: Override the center-field loading gate
meta.design_note: Final escape gate. Prevents the level from ending before the loud traversal phase.

meta.label: Optional broadcast booth drive grab
meta.design_note: Optional high-value loot for players who take the upper-route risk.

meta.label: Optional maintenance hoist for faster bag movement
meta.design_note: Optional team shortcut: risky climb creates easier bag movement.

meta.label: Getaway truck at center-field loading dock
Crew-split rally after field service key
Bowl rally secure point
meta.purpose: mid-control reward before final field-service push
